feature: P0 Fallback Quality Validation for Photo to Comic Pipeline
summary: Validated P0 Fallback Quality Validation feature with 5 non-negotiable validation dimensions. All 8 backend tests pass. Frontend Admin Dashboard Comic Health tab renders Validation Quality section and Fallback Validation Tests section correctly with all 5 dimensions displayed.

tests.name: test_single_panel_validation_returns_completed_with_5_dimensions
tests.details: POST /api/photo-to-comic/admin/fallback-validation with mode=single_panel returns COMPLETED with all 5 validation dimensions

tests.name: test_majority_failure_triggers_fallback_path
tests.details: POST /api/photo-to-comic/admin/fallback-validation with mode=majority_failure triggers fallback path (not repair) and returns lower perceived_quality_score

tests.name: test_get_validation_by_id_returns_full_results
tests.details: GET /api/photo-to-comic/admin/fallback-validation/{id} returns full validation results including test_panels, summary, validation_quality

tests.name: test_list_validations_returns_recent_results
tests.details: GET /api/photo-to-comic/admin/fallback-validations returns list of recent validation results

tests.name: test_ui_safety_audit_returns_pass_with_zero_violations
tests.details: GET /api/photo-to-comic/admin/ui-safety-audit returns overall PASS with 0 violations across 20 user-facing texts

tests.name: test_comic_health_returns_validation_quality_and_recent_validations
tests.details: GET /api/admin/metrics/comic-health returns validation_quality and recent_validations fields

tests.name: test_fallback_validation_requires_admin_role
tests.details: All admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users

tests.name: test_no_scary_words_in_user_facing_text
tests.details: PhotoToComic.js has ZERO scary words (fail, error, broken, crash, timeout, exception, fatal) in user-facing text

tests.name: Validation Quality (5 Dimensions) section renders
tests.details: Section visible with message 'No validation quality data yet. Run generations to collect scores.'

tests.name: Fallback Validation Tests section renders
tests.details: Section with 'Single Panel Failure' and 'Majority Failure (>50%)' buttons

tests.name: All 5 validation dimensions displayed
tests.details: Perceived (3/5), Narrative (5/5), Style (0.65), Latency (+4s), UI Safe (PASS)

tests.name: Single Panel validation test runs successfully
tests.details: Clicked button, validation completed with PASS verdict

tests.name: Recent Tests history displays
tests.details: Shows previous validation runs with PQS scores and panel counts

seed_data_creation: None - validation tests create simulated data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Fallback Quality Validation feature fully validated. All 5 validation dimensions working: perceived_quality_score (1-5), narrative_coherence (story flow), style_consistency_score (panel-to-panel), fallback_latency_penalty_ms (extra time from retries), ui_emotional_safety (no scary words). Admin can run controlled failure tests (single_panel and majority_failure modes) and view results on Admin Dashboard Comic Health tab. UI Safety Audit endpoint confirms ZERO scary words in user-facing text.

fallback_validation_endpoints.POST /api/photo-to-comic/admin/fallback-: Creates and runs controlled failure test

admin_dashboard.comic_health_tab: Renders Validation Quality and Fallback Validation Tests sections
admin_dashboard.validation_runner: Single Panel Failure and Majority Failure buttons work
admin_dashboard.5_dimensions_display: All 5 dimensions shown in validation results

ui_emotional_safety.PhotoToComic.js: ZERO scary words in user-facing text
